misconfig_patterns: OpenAI-compat container exposes without auth by default
NGC_API_KEY present in container environment — grants NVIDIA cloud registry access
PersistentVolume model cache world-readable in Kubernetes

active_probe.false_positive_check: model id field must follow NVIDIA NIM format e.g. meta/llama3-8b-instruct; nvcr.io may appear in image references in response

deployment_tells: NIM container images sourced from nvcr.io registry
PersistentVolume model cache in Kubernetes pod spec
pivot_paths: GET /v1/models → NIM model ID → identify NVIDIA catalog offering and version
NGC_API_KEY exposure → NVIDIA cloud registry pivot → private model access
nvcr.io image tag → identify exact model family and optimization profile
